## User-facing changes

- [ ] I updated relevant documentation, help text, or keyboard-command tables.
- [ ] I included screenshots or a terminal recording for visible UI changes when useful.
- [ ] This change does not alter user-facing behavior.

## Final checklist

- [ ] The pull request is focused and does not contain unrelated changes.
- [ ] New behavior has tests where practical.
- [ ] I considered keyboard-only, mouse, SSH, and cross-platform behavior.
- [ ] I removed debugging output, secrets, private paths, and generated files.
- [ ] I have read and followed `CONTRIBUTING.md` and the Code of Conduct.
